The person behind it

An engineer who went looking for the signal.

Jaz trained first as an engineer — a decade of thinking in waveforms and tolerances — before turning to the body. Fifteen years on she works where the two worlds meet: measurable frequency therapy on one side, information-field and Kundalini practice on the other. Most clients arrive having already tried the obvious things.

  • BEng
  • Nutritional therapist

  • Clinical hypnotherapist
